subcodes.first_line: We, verily, make mention of Him Whom We mentioned before, He Who was named Ahmad in the Kingdom of Names, that he might find tranquility through grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من ذکرناه من قبل الذی سمی باحمد فی ملکوت الاسماء لیطمئن بفضل
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
